note: The Who Did The Shoot gallery. Add a photo: drop the optimized jpg in assets/gallery/ and add a record here — the page renders this file.

shots.alt: Dancer mid-air between the kitchen counters of a penthouse lounge
shots.caption: Caught at the top of the jump — no wires, one take

shots.alt: DJ over the decks with the city skyline through the window
shots.caption: Serato over the skyline

shots.alt: Wide frame of a DJ setting up on a stone counter in a sunlit penthouse
shots.caption: The room before the party — natural light, no rig needed

shots.alt: Artist seated on a Polaris Slingshot on a downtown street at dusk
shots.caption: Dusk on the boulevard — shot for the record, not the 'gram

shots.alt: Vocalist at the mic in front of a painted storefront window
shots.caption: Live at the open mic — one mic, one window, all heart
